title: Border Wall Waste Accountability Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Oversight, Investigations, and Accountability.
crs_summary: Border Wall Waste Accountability Act This bill requires the Government Accountability Office to report to Congress on the total cost of unused construction materials that were obtained for construction of a U.S.-Mexico border wall from January 20, 2021, through January 20, 2025.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Oversight, Investigations, and Accountability.
